taylor-williams.female_specific_note: Taylor Williams Coaching focuses on female-specific HRT/peptide guidance. Per-peptide notes here often emphasize female dosing, fertility, hormone interactions.

reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 19:34, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "This is definitely, I wouldn't say it's like, you know, my top five peptides, but I think it is something that after the age of 30, everyone should run once a year." Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 17:58, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "Again, that's one of the things, we just don't really have a lotta data on it."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:41, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "we don't want to use it continuously. Again, a short approach is what seems to best now and seems have the most effective time."
- Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 15:19, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "people tend to get a little bit of kind of like a cold or flu-like symptoms that definitely happen to both myself and Taylor."
- Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 17:58, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "we don't know because it hasn't been studied at a large scale in humans."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Hunter Williams's dated sources differ: 2026-02-13 email (threadId 19c59414b3263570): "1 mg/day for 10 total doses"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI A Research Guide To Combating Cellular Senescence (2026-03-29, 11:57, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-research-guide-to-combating-cellular-senescence--0e3bb7be/): "if I were doing so hypothetically for a 2.5 milligram dose, what I would do is get a 10 milligram vial of FOXO4 TRI, I will put two milliliters of backwater and once a week, 50 units on an insulin syringe and that amount would last me for one month and I would do that for two months and then take two Months off. So that would be my recommended protocol for anti-aging Experimental research purposes only"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:07, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "I like to take that and say, hey, let's do one milligram a day for 10 days."

chronic.dose: Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI A Research Guide To Combating Cellular Senescence (2026-03-29, 10:18, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-research-guide-to-combating-cellular-senescence--0e3bb7be/): "three milligrams injected subcutaneously every other day for six days"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI A Research Guide To Combating Cellular Senescence (2026-03-29, 11:57, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-research-guide-to-combating-cellular-senescence--0e3bb7be/): "for a 2.5 milligram dose"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:07, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "three milligrams of a subq injection every day for six days"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:07, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "one milligram a day for 10 days"; Alex Kikel, The Next Big Things in Biohacking · EMF, Peptides, and Superhuman Performance with Alex Kikel (2026-04-30, 2:04:02, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/the-next-big-things-in-biohacking-emf-peptides-and-superhuman-performance-with-a--7d747dd0/): "I tend to like 1 milligram a day for a couple of days or like some higher bolus dose, maybe day of 5 milligrams."; Hunter Williams, Saturday Morning Coffee Talk · 2/7/26 (2026-04-08, 1:10:25, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-2726--4d465560/): "one milligram for 10 days in a row or like five days on, two days off for two weeks"
chronic.route: Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:41, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "it all has to be injected. There is no known oral administration."
chronic.frequency: Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 1:10, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "once or twice per year"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI A Research Guide To Combating Cellular Senescence (2026-03-29, 10:18, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-research-guide-to-combating-cellular-senescence--0e3bb7be/): "repeating the cycle one to three times per year"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:07, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "Monday through Friday, one milligrams at night before bed, and then you could do that the next week."
chronic.duration: Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:41, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "a short approach is what seems to best now"; Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 15:19, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "I used it for five days for two weeks in a row, and then I was done."
chronic.verbatim_citation: Hunter Williams, FOXO4-DRI: A Senolytic Peptide for Clearing Senescent Cells (2026-03-30, 13:07, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/foxo4-dri-a-senolytic-peptide-for-clearing-senescent-cells--dd55db28/): "so boom, you have 10 doses and you're good for the year."
